title: Dante's Inferno
writer: Philip Klein, Robert Yost, Dante Alighieri
actors: Spencer Tracy, Claire Trevor, Henry B. Walthall
plot: Jim Carter moves in on the McWade's carnival concession which shows scenes from Dante's "Inferno". He makes it a going concern, marrying Betty along the way. An inspector calls the amusement pier unsafe but Carter bribes him. The ...
